hero.headline: Your Reliable Partner in Global Logistics
hero.subheadline: International cargo transportation, customs clearance and warehousing across Central Asia and beyond

about.title: About Us
about.description: We are an international logistics company providing reliable cargo transportation services across Central Asia, Russia, China and Europe. With years of experience, we deliver excellence in every shipment.
about.mission: Our mission is to connect businesses across borders with fast, safe and transparent logistics solutions.
about.vision_desc: To become the leading logistics partner across Central Asia and beyond.
about.quality_desc: ISO certified processes ensuring the highest standards in every delivery.
about.team_desc: Experienced professionals dedicated to your cargo safety and satisfaction.
about.cta_desc: Get a free quote today and experience world-class logistics.
about.why_desc: We combine technology, experience and dedication to deliver excellence
about.process_desc: Simple and transparent process from request to delivery
about.global_network_desc: Connected to major logistics hubs across Central Asia, Europe and China.
about.cargo_security_desc: Full insurance coverage and real-time monitoring for every shipment.

services.title: Our Services
services.cargo_desc: International cargo transportation by road, rail and air
services.warehouse_desc: Secure storage facilities with modern inventory management
services.customs_desc: Full customs documentation and clearance services
services.railway_desc: Efficient railway logistics across Central Asia and Russia
services.road_desc: Flexible road freight solutions for any cargo size
services.subtitle: From air freight to bonded warehousing — one intelligent platform orchestrates your entire supply chain with real-time precision.

air.title: Air Freight
air.desc: Time-critical cargo flown on priority routes with door-to-door tracking and full customs coverage.

sea.title: Sea Freight
sea.desc: Full and less-than-container load shipments across major global trade lanes with optimized transit times.

rail.title: Rail Freight
rail.desc: Trans-continental rail corridors bridging Asia and Europe with reliable block-train schedules.

warehouse.title: Warehousing & 3PL
warehouse.desc: Bonded and customs-cleared storage with automated picking, packing, and last-mile integration.

customs.title: Customs Brokerage
customs.desc: AI-assisted document processing and expert classification across 90+ regulatory environments.

analytics.title: Smart Analytics
analytics.desc: Live shipment intelligence, predictive ETAs, and carbon footprint reporting on a single dashboard.
